_comment: Field documentation for a video-library record (P45). Committed doc only; carries no real data. tools/video_library.py is the sole writer of the gitignored store.

fields.platform_video_id: the platform's own id for this video/pin
fields.title: video title (untrusted content; injection-guarded on import)
fields.tags: array of tags/keywords (YouTube snippet.tags is public; empty elsewhere)
fields.stats: object {metric: {value, as_of, source_citation, publish_date}} via freshness_overlay.envelope; e.g. views, likes, comments, shares, saved, avg_watch_time
fields.retention: YouTube only: [{elapsed_ratio, watch_ratio, relative_perf}]; null on other platforms (not available)
fields.revenue: {estimated_revenue, currency, ...} null unless imported from a YouTube Studio CSV (never via API for a solo creator)
fields.transcript_ref: path to the gitignored transcript file, or null
fields.transcript_text: plain transcript text for FTS, or null (from local STT or a downloaded caption; never fabricated)
fields.chapters: [{start_s, title}] derived from the transcript or platform chapters
fields.most_watched_segments: [{start_ratio, end_ratio, label:'peak'|'cliff', text?}] derived from retention (+ transcript words on YouTube)
fields.source_mode: the evidence-mode rung that produced this record
